item.title: The Internet is Exhausting Now
item.description:
Thank you to Bombas for sponsoring this video! Head to https://bombas.com/gabi and use code gabi20 at checkout for 20% off your first purchase.
Song at the beginning of the vid: https://open.spotify.com/track/63WhiH2jsaEyFRvrnOgYvH?si=b866a298cc814e19 Edited by @BradenSwope (and me)
channels shouted out at the end! :) @kaylasays @nicky.reardon @JoshDare
━SOCIALS━ twitch ➭ https://www.twitch.tv/gabistreams instagram ➭ https://www.instagram.com/itsgabibelle twitter ➭ https://www.twitter.com/itsgabibelle tiktok ➭ https://www.tiktok.com/@itsgabibelle second channel ➭ https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4PlaGokmSqbKBdYObGLceQ
━COMMUNITY━ discord server ➭ https://discord.gg/VA2TYeK patreon ➭ https://www.patreon.com/gabibelle
━MUSIC━ spotify ➭ https://open.spotify.com/artist/35XGyNw5Q7bvcF8BWWXbom?si=2dd4926b4d404bc1 music channel ➭ https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_ZZxADAhDQmOMe0fDA_K_Q
━BUSINESS━ please email gabibelle@night.co
━CHAPTERS━ 00:00 this is exhausting 09:20 the ozempidemic (ozempic epidemic) 12:10 celebrities are dress up dolls apparently 24:14 my turn to get super hot 41:30 what did we learn today class 43:00 uwu
tags: #gabibelle
